title: Tinker and Create
description: "Tinker" around and you might just "Create" something awesome!
body:
# Tinker and Create
I built this modpack based around the Create mod and it's addons. 

It's got lots of different Aircraft types, guns that are Create-themed, new materials for Create (Tin, Bronze, and Steel), Create compatibility with Tinkers' Construct, allowing you to melt down Create mod ores, Create mod compatibility for Farmers Delight, and Create-themed currency, allowing you to set up simple shops.
